name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_SupportingInfo_Value
title: R5: value additional types
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` 0..1 `Attachment, boolean, Identifier, Quantity, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource), string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` 0..1 `Attachment, boolean, Identifier, Quantity, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource), string`
*  R4B: `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` 0..1 `Attachment, boolean, Quantity, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource), string`
*  R4: `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` 0..1 `Attachment, boolean, Quantity, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource), string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` do not cover the following types: Identifier.
The target context `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo`.

element.comment:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` do not cover the following types: Identifier.
The target context `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `ExplanationOfBenefit.supportingInfo`.
Could be used to provide references to other resources, document. For example, could contain a PDF in an Attachment of the Police Report for an Accident.

element.definition: Additional data or information such as resources, documents, images etc. including references to the data or the actual inclusion of the data.
element.comment: Could be used to provide references to other resources, document. For example, could contain a PDF in an Attachment of the Police Report for an Accident.
